title: oncoba glauca
intro: Oncoba glauca, also known as the ironplow or ironwood, is a plant species belonging to the family Salicaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties. The health benefits of Oncoba glauca include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and antimicrobial agent. In traditional herbal medicine, Oncoba glauca is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used as a powder or extract in various herbal preparations, such as capsules or tinctures.
